{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Goldmarks
| introduced = Of Shadow and Sea
}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Goldmarks]] are a form of currency found in [[Gray Island]] vaults.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c24">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Baldesar Kern]] was paid in [[goldmarks]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c22">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire concepts]]
[[Category:Elder Empire artifacts]]
[[Category:Currencies]]
